Meta.Architecture: Singleton-based Managers transitioning to Event-Driven (Event Broker).

Dependencies.Package: New Input System for player controls.

CoreScenes.Scene: Main menu and lobby for turret selection.

Module.name: GameManager
Module.Responsibility: Singleton managing global state (HP, Score, GameState).

Module.name: GameHUD
Module.Responsibility: UI controller for real-time gameplay feedback via UI Toolkit.

Module.name: EnemySpawner
Module.Responsibility: Wave-based enemy generation logic using Object Pooling.

Module.name: EnemyBot
Module.Responsibility: Enemy AI and basic movement logic.

Module.name: WaveManager
Module.Responsibility: Manages wave progression and publishes WaveStarted/Completed events.

Module.name: FeverManager
Module.Responsibility: Tracks enemy kills and manages the Fever Mode gauge.

Module.name: StartMenuController
Module.Responsibility: Main menu interaction and scene management.

Module.name: VFXTrigger
Module.Responsibility: Spawns particle VFX at hit location on damage/death events.

Module.name: SFXTrigger
Module.Responsibility: Plays sound effects on damage/death events.

Module.name: HitFlash
Module.Responsibility: MaterialPropertyBlock emission flash on damage for visual hit feedback.

StrictConventions.Rule: Focus exclusively on Wave Mode development.
Strictly avoid GameObject.Find(); use inspector refs or singletons.
Prefer Unity UI Toolkit for new UI screens.
Use K&R style braces for all C# scripts.
